items.inputUnderTest: Generate a test for inRange(x, lo, hi) which returns true iff x is within [lo, hi] inclusive.
items.referenceImpl: export function inRange(x, lo, hi) { return x >= lo && x <= hi; }
requirements: value inside the range returns true
a value outside the range returns false

items.inputUnderTest: Generate a test for letterGrade(score): A for >=90, D for >=60, else F.
items.referenceImpl: export function letterGrade(score) { if (score >= 90) return 'A'; if (score >= 60) return 'D'; return 'F'; }
requirements: the 90 boundary maps to A (not the lower grade)

items.inputUnderTest: Generate a test for isBlank(s): true when s is null/undefined or only whitespace.
items.referenceImpl: export function isBlank(s) { return s == null || s.trim().length === 0; }
requirements: a non-empty string is not blank

items.inputUnderTest: Generate a test for countAbove(arr, t): count of elements strictly greater than t.
items.referenceImpl: export function countAbove(arr, t) { return arr.filter(x => x > t).length; }
requirements: counts elements strictly greater than the threshold
a value equal to the threshold is excluded
returns 0 when no elements are above

items.inputUnderTest: Generate a test for parseBool(s): case-insensitive "true"/"false" -> boolean, throws on invalid.
items.referenceImpl: export function parseBool(s) { const v = String(s).toLowerCase(); if (v === 'true') return true; if (v === 'false') return false; throw new Error('invalid boolean'); }
requirements: "true" in any case parses to true
